product_overview: JadiPRD adalah aplikasi web untuk mengubah ide produk menjadi PRD dan UI Prompt melalui wawancara AI. Pengguna dapat masuk, mengisi konteks produk lewat chat, menghasilkan dokumen, lalu meninjau, menyalin, mengunduh, dan merevisi hasilnya.
core_goals: Masuk ke aplikasi dan mengakses area pengguna yang terlindungi
Mengumpulkan konteks produk melalui wawancara AI
Menghasilkan dokumen PRD dan UI Prompt dari hasil wawancara
Meninjau hasil dokumen, berpindah antar versi, serta menyalin atau mengunduh kontennya
Memberi catatan pada section tertentu untuk membuat versi revisi baru
Melihat riwayat dokumen dan draft wawancara dari dashboard

features.name: Landing page navigation
features.description: Pengguna memahami nilai produk, melihat preview keluaran, dan masuk ke alur pembuatan PRD atau dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe product overview and output preview -> Switch between PRD.md, UI Prompt, and Versi dokumen tabs -> Switch workflow steps to read step details -> Start PRD interview from the landing page
Navigate to / -> Observe product overview and output preview -> Open dashboard from the landing page -> Continue to the authenticated area after login if needed

features.name: Google authentication
features.description: Pengguna masuk dengan akun Google dan kembali ke halaman tujuan yang sempat dituju.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Start Google sign-in -> Select a Google account -> See the authenticated state and return to the requested page
Navigate to /login -> Start Google sign-in -> Cancel account selection -> Remain on the login page
Open the user menu -> Choose logout -> Confirm logout -> See the signed-out state

features.name: Dashboard document history
features.description: Pengguna yang sudah masuk dapat melihat dokumen, draft wawancara, statistik, dan membuka item yang tersimpan.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View document count, interview count, and revision count -> Search documents by visible title -> Open a document row -> See the result preview page
Navigate to /dashboard -> View saved draft interviews -> Open a draft interview -> Continue the unfinished interview session
Navigate to /dashboard -> Choose to start a new PRD -> Open the interview flow

features.name: AI interview
features.description: Pengguna menjawab pertanyaan satu per satu, memakai saran cepat bila perlu, dan sesi wawancara tersimpan sebagai draft.
user_flows: Navigate to /interview -> Read the current AI question -> Type an answer -> Send the answer -> See the next question and updated progress checklist
Navigate to /interview -> Read the current AI question -> Select a quick suggestion -> See the suggestion fill the response or advance the flow
Navigate to /interview?session=... -> Resume a saved draft interview -> Continue answering the remaining questions -> See the session persist as the conversation progresses

features.name: Generate PRD and UI Prompt
features.description: Pengguna mengubah hasil wawancara menjadi PRD dan UI Prompt yang disimpan sebagai dokumen baru.
user_flows: Navigate to /interview -> Complete the interview context -> Trigger PRD generation -> Wait while the generation state is shown -> Get redirected to the result page
Navigate to /interview -> Trigger PRD generation from a final suggestion -> Wait while generation state is shown -> See the generated document preview on the result page
Navigate to /interview -> Trigger PRD generation with incomplete or unsuitable input -> See generation failure feedback

features.name: Result preview and navigation
features.description: Pengguna meninjau PRD atau UI Prompt, berpindah antar versi, menyalin konten, mengunduh markdown, dan menavigasi ke section tertentu.
user_flows: Navigate to /result/[id] -> Switch between PRD and UI Prompt tabs -> Click table-of-contents headings -> Jump to the selected section
Navigate to /result/[id] -> Select an older version pill -> View the previous version content -> Switch back to the latest version
Navigate to /result/[id] -> Copy the current tab content -> See the copy action complete
Navigate to /result/[id] -> Download the current tab as markdown -> Save the file locally

features.name: Section-level revision
features.description: Pengguna menambahkan catatan pada section tertentu untuk menghasilkan versi baru dengan revisi terarah.
user_flows: Navigate to /result/[id] -> Choose a section to revise -> Add a note for that section -> Review the section -> See a new version selected with the revised content
Navigate to /result/[id] -> Choose a section to revise -> Leave the note empty or unclear -> Attempt to review the section -> See validation or error feedback

tech_stack: Google Gemini, Groq, and 9router AI providers
react-markdown and mermaid for document preview

routes.description: Landing page explaining JadiPRD, primary CTA to start PRD interview, dashboard CTA, product output preview, and workflow preview.
Google sign-in page with redirect back to requested page after login.
User dashboard with document history, draft interview sessions, search by document title, stats, and navigation to interview/result pages.
AI interview chat for collecting product context, quick suggestions, progress checklist, draft session persistence, and PRD generation.
PRD and UI Prompt preview page with tab switcher, table of contents, per-section notes, revision execution, version selector, copy, and download actions.

features.name: Landing page navigation
features.description: Users can understand the product value, preview output types, open dashboard, or start an interview.
user_interactions: Click Buat PRD to start interview or login first
Click Buka dashboard to open dashboard or login first
Switch output preview tabs between PRD.md, UI Prompt, and Versi dokumen
Switch workflow steps to read step details

features.name: Google authentication
features.description: Users sign in with Google, stay authenticated through Firebase Auth, and are redirected back to the intended page.
user_interactions: Click Lanjut dengan Google
Select a Google account in popup
See loading state while auth is restored
Open logout confirmation and confirm/cancel logout

features.name: Dashboard document history
features.description: Authenticated users can view generated documents and unfinished interviews stored in Firestore.
user_interactions: View document count, interview count, and revision count
Search documents by visible title
Click a document row to open result preview
Click a draft interview to continue
Click Buat PRD or Baru to start a new interview

api_calls.endpoint: Firestore outputs collection filtered by user_id
Firestore interview_sessions collection filtered by user_id

features.name: AI interview
features.description: Authenticated users answer one question at a time, can use quick suggestions, and sessions are saved to Firestore.
user_interactions: Type an answer and send it
Click a suggestion to fill the input or trigger PRD generation
Continue a saved draft interview via session query string
Watch progress checklist update from conversation coverage

features.name: Generate PRD and UI Prompt
features.description: The app converts interview messages into a PRD and UI Prompt, stores project/output documents, and creates initial version history.
user_interactions: Click Buat PRD from header or final suggestion
Wait while generation message is shown
Get redirected to /result/[id] after successful generation
See alert on generation failure

features.name: Result preview and navigation
features.description: Users can preview generated PRD/UI Prompt, switch tabs, use table of contents, copy content, download markdown, and select older versions.
user_interactions: Switch between PRD and UI Prompt
Click table-of-contents headings to jump to sections
Click version pills to view previous versions
Click Salin to copy current tab content
Click Unduh to download current tab as markdown

api_calls.endpoint: Firestore outputs document from server component

features.name: Section-level revision
features.description: Users can add notes to a specific PRD or UI Prompt section and generate a new version while unchanged sections are copied.
user_interactions: Click Beri note beside a section heading
Type a note for the selected section
Click Review section
See revised section and new version selected
See error feedback if revision fails

known_limitations.issue: Google login uses a popup, which may require manual OAuth handling or a seeded authenticated browser context in automated tests.
known_limitations.impact: Full login E2E can fail if the test runner cannot complete Google OAuth.

known_limitations.issue: AI generation depends on external provider keys, model availability, and account credits.
known_limitations.impact: Generate PRD tests may be flaky or expensive without mocking provider responses.

known_limitations.issue: Manual markdown editor code path remains but the Edit button was removed from the UI.
known_limitations.impact: No visible user impact, but unused UI state remains in code.
